  overflow: auto !important;
}
.stamped-header-title, .stamped-summary-actions-newreview {
  display: none;
}
.summary-overview, .stamped-summary-caption {
  float: right !important;
}
.stamped-container, .stamped-review-header-title {
  text-align: right !important;
}
.author, .stamped-review-content-body {
  direction: rtl !important;
}
#stamped-reviews-tab {
  text-align: right !important;
  direction: rtl;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: max-content;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.stamped-summary-text-1 {
  margin-right: 0;
  margin-left: 5px;
}
.stamped-review .author {
  margin-right: 0;
  margin-left: 7px;
}
#stamped-reviews-tab .stamped-review {
  position:unset !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.stamped-review-content-wrapper {
  position: relative;
}
.created {
  display: inline-block;
}
.stamped-starratings{
  display: inline-block;
  position: absolute;
  left: 20px;
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 844px) {
  .stamped-header-title, .stamped-summary-actions-newreview {
    display: none;
 }
  .stamped-summary{
    text-align:right;
 }
  [data-version="2"] .stamped-summary-caption{
    display: block !important;
 }
  .summary-overview {
    float: right;
 }
  .stamped-container {
    text-align: right;
 }
  .created {
    float: unset !important;
    display: block;
 }
  #stamped-reviews-tab {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
 }
  .stamped-starratings {
    position: unset;
 }
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 480px){
  .summary-overview {
    margin-bottom: 0;
 }
}

[data-count="0"] {
	display: none;
}

#stamped-main-widget { overflow: visible !important; }
[data-widget-style=profile] .stamped-review-product:before { content: 'Reviewing: ' !important; }
a.stamped-review-read-more { font-size: 0px; }
a.stamped-review-read-more:before { content: 'Read more'; font-size: 13px !important; }
.stamped-file-uploader-btn-label2:before { content: ' Add Photos' !important; }
